# Meridian Technologies Inc. — Third Quarter 2025 Financial Results

**Headquarters:** Austin, Texas
**Ticker:** MRDN (NASDAQ)
**Reporting Period:** July 1, 2025 - September 30, 2025
**Report Date:** October 28, 2025

## Executive Summary

Meridian Technologies Inc. delivered strong third-quarter results, driven by continued demand for its enterprise cloud orchestration platform and expansion into the federal government sector. The company surpassed analyst consensus estimates for both revenue and earnings per share.

## Financial Highlights

| Metric | Q3 2025 | Q3 2024 | YoY Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| Total Revenue | $847.3M | $753.8M | +12.4% |
| Gross Profit | $562.1M | $488.7M | +15.0% |
| Gross Margin | 66.3% | 64.8% | +1.5 pp |
| Operating Income | $173.9M | $141.2M | +23.2% |
| Net Income | $127.6M | $108.4M | +17.7% |
| Diluted EPS | $2.84 | $2.41 | +17.8% |
| Free Cash Flow | $198.2M | $164.7M | +20.3% |

## Revenue Breakdown

### By Segment

- **Cloud Platform Services:** $512.8M (60.5% of revenue), up 16.1% YoY
- **Professional Services & Consulting:** $201.4M (23.8% of revenue), up 7.3% YoY
- **Licensing & Maintenance:** $133.1M (15.7% of revenue), up 5.9% YoY

### By Geography

- **North America:** $593.1M (70.0% of revenue)
- **Europe, Middle East & Africa:** $169.5M (20.0% of revenue)
- **Asia-Pacific:** $84.7M (10.0% of revenue)

## Operational Metrics

- **Total Employees:** 4,200 (up from 3,870 in Q3 2024)
- **Net Revenue Retention Rate:** 118%
- **Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR):** $3.24B
- **Customers with ARR > $1M:** 87 (up from 72 in Q3 2024)
- **Remaining Performance Obligations (RPO):** $4.1B

## Balance Sheet Summary (as of September 30, 2025)

- **Cash and Cash Equivalents:** $1.42B
- **Total Debt:** $620M (long-term credit facility)
- **Shareholders' Equity:** $3.87B

## CEO Commentary

"Q3 was a milestone quarter for Meridian," said CEO David Chen. "Our cloud platform ARR crossed the $3 billion threshold, and our federal business secured two new FedRAMP High authorizations, opening significant pipeline in the defense and intelligence community. We are raising our full-year guidance to reflect this momentum."

## Updated Full-Year 2025 Guidance

| Metric | Previous Guidance | Updated Guidance |
|---|---|---|
| Total Revenue | $3.28B - $3.34B | $3.36B - $3.40B |
| Operating Margin | 19.5% - 20.5% | 20.0% - 21.0% |
| Diluted EPS | $10.40 - $10.80 | $10.90 - $11.20 |
| Free Cash Flow | $720M - $760M | $770M - $800M |

## Q4 2025 Outlook

The company expects Q4 2025 revenue in the range of $870M to $890M, representing 11% to 13% year-over-year growth. Meridian plans to expand its Austin headquarters campus, adding approximately 200,000 square feet of office and lab space, with completion targeted for Q2 2026.

*Forward-looking statements in this report are subject to risks and uncertainties. Actual results may differ materially from those projected.*
